name: io.argoproj.workflow.v1alpha1.ArtGCStatus
description: ArtGCStatus maintains state related to ArtifactGC

notSpecified.description: if this is true, we already checked to see if we need to do it and we don't

podsRecouped.description: have completed Pods been processed? (mapped by Pod name) used to prevent re-processing the Status of a Pod more than once

strategiesProcessed.description: have Pods been started to perform this strategy? (enables us not to re-process what we've already done)
